brand_vibe: Premium, artisan, grounded, warm, and inviting. Escaping the typical bright red/neon corporate fast-food look for a more curated, local-market feel.

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F4F1EA]/80 border-b border-[#E3DCCF] transition-all

hero_section.style: asymmetrical bento grid. Left col (span 7): Large typography, staggered entrance. Right col (span 5): Large feature image with soft rounded edges.
hero_section.overlay: bg-gradient-to-t from-black/40 to-transparent for any text on images.

cards_restaurant.style: bg-white border border-[#E3DCCF] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(29,40,32,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#C2533B] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-[#A6432D] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1D2820] border-2 border-[#E3DCCF] px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:border-[#1D2820] transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#69726A] hover:text-[#1D2820] hover:bg-[#E3DCCF]/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl transition-colors

inputs.style: w-full bg-white border border-[#E3DCCF] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#1D2820] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D49A36] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-shadow placeholder:text-[#69726A]

badges.style: px-3 py-1 bg-[#F4F1EA] text-[#1D2820] text-sm font-bold rounded-lg border border-[#E3DCCF]

ai_chatbot_floating.style: fixed bottom-6 right-6 w-14 h-14 bg-[#43614B] text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform z-50
ai_chatbot_floating.panel: absolute bottom-20 right-0 w-80 bg-white border border-[#E3DCCF] rounded-2xl shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] overflow-hidden flex flex-col

restaurant_vendor.layout: Side navigation (bg-[#1D2820] text-white) + Main content area (bg-[#F4F1EA])
restaurant_vendor.cards: Flat white surfaces, tight grids (gap-4 or gap-6), functional tables for orders

delivery_partner.layout: Mobile-first view. Large typography for earning stats, full-width swipe-to-accept buttons, prominent map view.

admin.layout: High-density data view. Use Archetype 4 (Swiss & High Contrast) principles here: Stark white background, sharp borders, monochrome data charts with primary color highlights.

motion_and_interaction.page_load: Framer motion staggered fade-up for main elements (duration: 0.5s, stagger: 0.1s)
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Must ensure text color contrasts properly. Cards lift up slightly on hover.
motion_and_interaction.modals: Backdrop blur on overlay, slide-up from bottom with subtle spring physics.

hero.description: Top view of a delicious charcuterie spread, conveying premium artisan food.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text on #C2533B is white. Text on #F4F1EA must be #1D2820 or #69726A for secondary.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include a kebab-case role-based 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='checkout-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT introduce standard blue or red.
Implement Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body text.
For customer-facing pages, use generous padding and bento-box layouts. Do not center-everything.
Build the AI floating chatbot using Shadcn popover/sheet, styling the toggle button with the accent color (#43614B).
For vendor/admin dashboards, tighten the spacing (gap-4) and use flat card designs with a 1px border instead of heavy shadows.
Ensure all dummy data uses the provided Unsplash/Pexels image URLs. NEVER use placeholders.
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations on the landing page and menu lists.
